description: Stdio-first Agent MCP workpack for local tools, audit chains, search, memory, and pipelines.
name: io.github.haoyun18881-beep/universal-brute-workpack

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a custom Universal Brute Workpack config JSON.
environmentVariables.name: UBW_CONFIG

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a custom profile and deny-list JSON.
environmentVariables.name: UBW_PROFILES

environmentVariables.description: Optional semicolon-separated filesystem roots for local file tools.
environmentVariables.name: UBW_ROOTS

environmentVariables.description: Optional Tavily key for search.web before fallback providers.
environmentVariables.name: TAVILY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Exa key for search.web before fallback providers.
environmentVariables.name: EXA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional memory or vector service endpoint for memory.search.
environmentVariables.name: UBW_MEMORY_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for Agent tasks.
environmentVariables.name: LLM_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional model API key for Agent tasks.
environmentVariables.name: LLM_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional model name for Agent tasks.
environmentVariables.name: LLM_MODEL

title: Universal Brute Workpack
